info.name: Sync / Idempotency
info.description: Demonstrates the offline sync safety foundation: idempotent sale creation via X-Idempotency-Key header and externalId field. Apply the same pattern to Shift, StockMovement, and PurchaseOrder when those routes are wired.

item.name: POS — Create Sale (first attempt, with sync headers)

header.description: Stable UUID for this logical operation. Use the SAME value on every retry.

request.description:
First submission. The response will contain `meta.syncAck` with `fromCache: false`. Store the `X-Idempotency-Key` value and use it verbatim on retries.

IMPORTANT: `externalId` should be the local SQLite record ID — NOT a new GUID each time. Use the same `externalId` across retries for the same record.

item.name: POS — Create Sale (retry, same idempotency key)

header.description: Must be the SAME key used in the first attempt.

request.description:
Retry with the same X-Idempotency-Key. The response is served from the Redis cache. `meta.syncAck.fromCache` will be `true`. No new Sale is created. Stock is NOT decremented again.

Set {{idempotencyKey}} to the same UUID you used in the first request.

item.name: POS — Create Sale (no idempotency header, standard request)

request.description: Standard (non-sync) sale creation. No X-Idempotency-Key header. No externalId. The response does NOT include `meta.syncAck`. Fully backward-compatible.

item.name: POS — Create Sale (externalId dedup, Redis cache expired)

header.description: A NEW key (simulates Redis cache expiry — key is not in cache).

request.description: Simulates a retry after the 24 h Redis TTL has expired. A NEW X-Idempotency-Key is used (so Redis returns a cache miss), but `externalId` matches an existing Sale. The service finds the record by `externalId` and returns it without creating a duplicate. The response will contain the existing Sale's `id` and `externalId`.

item.name: POS — Get Sale (verify no duplicate was created)

request.description: Fetch the sale returned by any of the sync attempts. Confirm a single record exists with the expected total and externalId.

variable.description: Copy the X-Idempotency-Key UUID from the first request here.
The externalId you used (your local SQLite record UUID).
A fresh UUID to simulate Redis cache expiry.
